title: Let users change the columns' width in My Works
excerpt:

posts.author: bob1 (bob)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, it would be great if we could change the column width in My Work.

When I get assigned to a subitem, I can’t see the full text in the column “Board” so I can’t even know what board it is from. I have to hover my mouse over every single item and it is extremely annoying.

Getting a bigger screen doesn’t work either, extending the display only extends the width of the task name column and all other columns keep the same size.

So yeah, allowing users to change column width in My Work would be very nice.

posts.author: smithws (Scott Smith)
posts.cookedHtml: Has there been any movement on this? Because the board column in “My Work” unnecessarily says “subitems of,” most of our board (project) name is cut off.

posts.author: AntoinetteForbes (Antoinette Forbes)
posts.cookedHtml: Oh I got this request today from one of the team! They keep deleting the dates out because the column is too small. I know its user error but it woudl be amazing to able to resize columns!

posts.author: Just1n (🍉 Justin 🍉)
posts.cookedHtml:
YES. Why is this not possible? You can change column width everywhere in Monday.com but not in My Work.

Very weird and highly annoying to only have 21 characters before names get cut off.
